languages.text: Пленники временной петли не понимают, где находятся. Нечто мешает им воспринимать все, что не вписано в этот чудовищный спектакль. Они старательно вписывают в свою реальность Вольного Торговца.

traits.locale_text: Пленники временной петли не понимают, где находятся. Нечто мешает им воспринимать все, что не вписано в этот чудовищный спектакль. Они старательно вписывают в свою реальность Вольного Торговца.

languages.text: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.
languages.original_text: Пленники временной петли не понимают, где находятся. Нечто мешает им воспринимать все, что не вписано в этот чудовищный спектакль. Они старательно вписывают в свою реальность Вольного Торговца.

traits.locale_text: The captives within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

languages.text: In der Zeitschleife gefangene Seelen, wissen nicht, wo sie sich befinden. Irgendetwas verhindert, dass sie Dinge außerhalb dieses monströsen Spektakels wahrnehmen. Sie arbeiten daran, den Freihändler in ihre eigene Realität einzuflechten.
languages.original_text: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

traits.locale_text: In der Zeitschleife gefangene Seelen, wissen nicht, wo sie sich befinden. Irgendetwas verhindert, dass sie Dinge außerhalb dieses monströsen Spektakels wahrnehmen. Sie arbeiten daran, den Freihändler in ihre eigene Realität einzuflechten.

languages.text: Les personnes prises au piège dans la boucle temporelle n'ont pas conscience de l'endroit où elles se trouvent. Quelque chose les empêche de percevoir tout ce qui est extérieur à ce spectacle grotesque. Elles font tout pour intégrer {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} à leur propre réalité.
languages.original_text: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

traits.locale_text: Les personnes prises au piège dans la boucle temporelle n'ont pas conscience de l'endroit où elles se trouvent. Quelque chose les empêche de percevoir tout ce qui est extérieur à ce spectacle grotesque. Elles font tout pour intégrer {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} à leur propre réalité.

languages.text: 那些被困在时间循环里的人并不明白自己身处何地。某种力量阻碍了他们感知这场恐怖奇观之外的一切。他们拼命想把行商浪人拉进他们所编织的现实中。
languages.original_text: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

traits.locale_text: 那些被困在时间循环里的人并不明白自己身处何地。某种力量阻碍了他们感知这场恐怖奇观之外的一切。他们拼命想把行商浪人拉进他们所编织的现实中。

languages.text: Los cautivos del bucle temporal no son conscientes de su situación. Algo impide que perciban todo lo que es ajeno a este monstruoso espectáculo, y se afanan por arrastrar {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente a su propia realidad.
languages.original_text: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.

traits.locale_text: Los cautivos del bucle temporal no son conscientes de su situación. Algo impide que perciban todo lo que es ajeno a este monstruoso espectáculo, y se afanan por arrastrar {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente a su propia realidad.

languages.text: タイムループの囚人たちは、自分たちがどこにいるのか気づいていない。さらに、この怪物のような光景にそぐわないものを知覚することを妨げるものがある。
languages.original_text: The captives of the time loop do not realise where they are. Moreover, something prevents them from perceiving anything that does not fit into this monstrous spectacle.

languages.text: Zaman döngüsünün içinde hapsolanlar nerede olduklarını kavrayamıyor. Bir şey, bu korkunç gösterinin dışında kalan her şeyi algılamalarını engelliyor. Hür Tacir'i kendi gerçekliğine dâhil etmek için çabalıyor.
languages.original_text: Those trapped within the temporal loop do not comprehend where they are. Something hinders their perception of anything that falls outside this monstrous spectacle. They labour to weave the Rogue Trader into their own reality.
